## Related

- Closes #
- Feature slug: `<centinela start <feature-slug>>`

## Centinela checklist

- [ ] Feature started with `centinela start <feature>`
- [ ] `plan` step artifacts written: `docs/features/<feature>.md`, `docs/plans/<feature>.md`, `specs/<feature>.feature`
- [ ] `code` step: implementation respects archetype layer rules and the 100-line file limit
- [ ] `tests` step: unit + integration + acceptance coverage added; `.workflow/<feature>-edge-cases.md` written
- [ ] `validate` step: `centinela validate` passes locally; coverage stays ≥ 95%
- [ ] `docs` step: knowledge-base markdown written to `docs/project-docs/kb/<feature>.md`; docs regenerated
- [ ] Orchestration evidence JSON files match the contract at `docs/architecture/evidence-contract.md`
